upstream_note: v1 fixes the upstream to the OpenAI shape on /v1/chat/completions; every non-openai cell is a translation claim. The full 6x6 (all upstream dialects) is future work.

openai-responses.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough mock canned /responses body (id resp_x) — the gateway proxied /v1/responses through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)

anthropic.verdict_note: HTTP 405 on POST /v1/messages: bad not JSON

gemini.verdict_note: HTTP 405 on POST /v1beta/models/gpt-4o-mini:generateContent: bad not JSON

cohere.verdict_note: HTTP 404/405 on /v2/chat, then HTTP 405 on fallback /v1/chat: bad not JSON

bedrock.verdict_note: HTTP 405 on POST /model/gpt-4o-mini/converse: bad not JSON

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
